content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be reconfigured to dynamically prune and prioritize curiosity signals from intrinsic reward models like ICM and RND, rather than just storing environmental interaction data. This creates a 'curiosity memory buffer' that only retains high-impact, learning-relevant intrinsic rewards that align with the agent’s long-horizon task goals, rather than wasting compute on trivial novel distractors.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
